MODULE: cosmos.core.cross_agent_memory
FILE: cosmos/core/cross_agent_memory.py (899 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Cross-Agent Memory - Memory Engineering for Agent Collaboration.

AGI v1.8 Feature: Enables sophisticated memory sharing and context
handoffs between agents during collaborative tasks.

Features:
- MemoryNamespace: Scoped memory access (private, team, swarm, task, session)
- CrossAgentContext

CLASSES:
- MemoryNamespace(Enum): Scoped memory access levels.
- ContextType(Enum): Types of context that can be shared.
- HandoffReason(Enum): Reasons for handing off context between agents.
- CrossAgentContext: Standardized context packet for agent-to-agent sharing.

  Methods: def from_any(cls, data: dict) -> 'CrossAgentContext'
